name: Hot Girls at the beach (or something like that) (Fiona Fox, Nicole the Lynx, Sally Acorn)
description:
Turns out I can make the “Hot Girls Club” bot again, ain’t that cool?

Enjoy this while you’re at it, also…I guess this is accurate to the Comic?, shit idk myself, I suppose their should be times where it shouldnt be accurate, can’t just fill up a fucking smut bot with lore that it probably won’t use, that’s bullshit, also I was kinda lazy with the intro with this, couldnt really think of a better one ngl
creator: Arandomguy182
